detail.description:
There's a new fashion super stylist glow in town! In this fashion makeover Hollywood story game, tailor stunning outfits and ensure your makeup and fashion styling are always on point. 
Be seen in Hollywood and glow! Dress to impress at fancy events, win every fashion battle, and take stylish pics for Stylegram. Show off your tailor-made fashion styling, dress up, and makeup skills in one of the best fashion games!

You've just realized that you could turn your mad shopping and makeup skills int
detail.recentChanges:
Hey Stylists!
Get ready for a fresh wave of glam

Discover new Necklace & Lipstick Collections, spread your style with Fantasy Wings!

Bloom in the Spring Event, don’t forget to shine in the Zodiac Event – Taurus!

Rule the runway at Fashion Week, and spin the Double Wheel!
Plus, enjoy 20 new levels to conquer.

Update now and let your style shine!
Love the game? Leave a review
